form.formComment: Finding it hard to put a couple of good runs together. Last start was was well back in the run when 3rd (Fr6) over 2080m at Cranbourne was 4th-13.2 at the bell, beaten 10 m by Jays All That (2:41.20) in 0-2 LTW TROT on April 3 at $26. Before that beaten 11 metres, sixth at this track over 1690m NR up to 36 on March 30. Facing a tough assignment this time around.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into tenth behind Mielicki at Ballarat over 2200m in a NR 46 to 51 on March 19 at $9. Then a handy effort when beaten by 2.25 m finishing second after showing early speed, behind April Sun at this track over 2190m in a NR 48 to 52 on March 30 at $4.20. Heading the right way and is a player.

form.formComment: Last start 8th (Fr6) over 2180m after showing early pace at Kilmore beaten 75 m by Dels Destiny (2:44.90) in NR 50 to 55 on April 2 at $13. Improver second up.

form.formComment: Five-year-old entire is racing in fine form. Won his last two outings at Terang and Ballarat. Last start posted a big 5 m win as favourite (Sr1) at Terang (2:46.40) beating Ridethelightning in 0-1 WIN on March 27 at $2. Can land the hat trick.
